name: Alternaturals, Inc.
summary: Alternaturals, Inc. manufactures and distributes supplements and all-natural remedies that are alternatives to prescription drugs. Its products include Focamine, an all-natural focus, attention, and concentration promoter for people suffering from ADHD; and Sombium, an alternative sleep aid. The company was formerly known as Premier Mortgage Resources, Inc. and changed its name to Alternaturals, Inc. in May 2014. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Grandville, Michigan.
